description_long: This is a compact, military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The body is painted in a matte olive green, with exposed wheel arches and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The vehicle features two front seats and a rear bench, all upholstered in a brown material, and is equipped with a prominent spare tire and jerry can mounted on the rear. The windshield is upright and split, with simple side mirrors and a long, thin radio antenna extending from the rear. The front grille is vertical with round headlights and a flat hood, while the wheels are robust and designed for rugged terrain. The interior appears open and accessible, with a basic dashboard and a large steering wheel.
description: A compact, olive green, military-style SUV with a boxy shape, exposed spare tire, and utilitarian features. It has an open cabin, upright windshield, and rugged wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, two front seats, rear bench, and the spare tire mounted at the back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the vertical grille, round headlights, upright windshield, and visible steering wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, but the jerry can on the rear is more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spare tire, jerry can, rear bench, and the long antenna extending upward.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black wheels with simple, utilitarian design and no visible spokes
